text: [Doubt 75%] Knock Missed training ahead of the Bournemouth game on 11/4 and didn’t feature. His manager couldn’t provide an update after the match. [Source]

[Injured] Foot injury Sustained a foot injury in the game against Manchester United on 25/1. Subsequent assessment has revealed he has a bone injury. Will have surgery and be out of action "for an extended period" but is aiming to return to full training before the end of the season. [Source]
[Injured] Achilles injury Withdrew from the England squad on 28/3 and returned to Arsenal for "medical assessment". Has been sidelined since. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Ankle injury Suffered an ankle injury in the match against Everton on 14/3 and has been sidelined since. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a serious knee injury in the FA Cup tie against Spurs on 10/1. Will miss the rest of the season. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Has been out for two months with a hamstring injury but is back in partial training as of 17/4. Won’t feature against Newcastle on 18/4. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury The club confirmed on 6/1 that he had undergone knee surgery and "will consequently face a period away from the pitch as part of his recovery". His manager estimates an absence of 3-4 months. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury It was reported on 20/11 that he had sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury and would be out for the rest of the season. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Back in modified training as of 27/2 after a long spell out with a knee injury. Won’t be rushed back into action. His manager said on 17/4 that he's "been working really well". [Source]
[Injured] Knock Will miss the Fulham match on 18/4 after picking up a knock in training. [Source]
[Injured] Knock Returned from international duty with a knock. His manager said on 17/4 that he’ll likely be out for a couple more weeks. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off in the match against Bournemouth on 3/3 with a hamstring strain. His manager expects him to be out for "numerous weeks". Still sidelined as of 17/4. [Source]

[Injured] Foot injury Sat out the Burnley game on 28/2 with a "knock". It later transpired that he had suffered a metatarsal injury. Out until after the March international break. Still sidelined as of 17/4. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His club reported on 15/10 that he had suffered an ACL injury and had undergone season-ending surgery. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Tottenham Hotspur on 18/4. His manager thinks he has avoided serious injury but he'll miss Chelsea on 21/4 and could be out for weeks. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Muscle injury Missed the Tottenham Hotspur game on 18/4 with a minor muscle issue. Won't recover for the Chelsea match on 21/4 but "should" return thereafter. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Knock Missed the Burnley game on 11/4 with a minor issue picked up in training. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 20/4 that he was "sure that we will see him back" this season. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Aston Villa on 3/12. He will be out for the season after ACL damage was detected. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His manager confirmed on 26/7 that he will undergo surgery on a knee ligament injury. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Lack of match fitness Back in “modified training” after nine months out with a knee injury. His manager said on 16/4 that he will make a late call on his involvement against Forest, given his length of absence. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Returned from a long-term knee injury in pre-season but had a small setback with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. His manager reported another setback on 16/10. On the grass as of 23/12 but his club are taking their time with him. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a serious knee injury in the match against Everton on 27/12. Ruled out for nine months. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Fulham on 21/3. Has been sidelined since. Still out as of 21/4. [Source]

[Injured] Achilles injury Missed the start of the season. Had been training and aiming for a return to action after the October international break but he has had a setback and will be out for “a few months”. In training as of 11/3 but still "weeks" from being able to play. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the match against Manchester United on 18/4. Will miss the Brighton game on 21/4 as further assessment is needed. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Has been out since August with an ACL injury. Rejoined training in March. Will play for the under-21s on 17/4 and 25/4 as he builds match fitness. Is expected to feature for the first team before the end of the season. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Hamstring injury Came off early in the match against West Ham on 31/1 with a hamstring injury. His manager said on 5/2 that it looked like a “long-term” issue. Had been on the cusp of a return against Newcastle on 14/3 but felt his hamstring again before the game and couldn't feature. Was on the verge of another comeback but suffered yet another hamstring issue on the eve of the FA Cup tie against Port Vale on 4/4. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the closing stages of the Newcastle game on 14/3. Will be out until after the March international break. His manager said on 3/4 that he still didn't have a return date but that he was "getting along really well". Back running as of 10/4. A "little bit further away" than teammate Trevoh Chalobah as of 16/4. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Groin Injury Missed the Newcastle game on 14/3 with a groin issue. Has been sidelined since and it was revealed on 19/3 that he'd undergone "minor" surgery. Will be out for "weeks". Not expected back on 12/4. [Source]
[Suspended] Provisionally suspended by the Football Association after failing a drugs test. [Source]

[Injured] Lack of match fitness Has been out for over a year with a knee injury but has returned to training. Has featured three times for the under-21s to boost his match fitness. His manager said on 8/4 that he has had a "few disrupted weeks" due to muscle discomfort but that he should be back in training by the end of the week. Palace will continue to be cautious with him. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Fiorentina on 9/4. His manager ruled him out for at least 3-4 weeks on 12/4. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Fulham game on 1/1 with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. Was on the cusp of a return in April but reinjured himself in training on 8/4. His season is now over. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Taken off in the match agaisnt Fiorentina on 16/4 with an abductor injury. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Liverpool on 19/4. His club reported on 22/4 that he'd likely be out for the season. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Head injury Taken off with a head injury in the match against Liverpool on 19/4. [Source]
[Injured] Foot injury Confirmed on 20/1 that he had suffered a stress fracture in his foot. Could be out for the season if surgery is required. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Brentford on 18/4. His manager doesn't think it is too serious. [Source]

[Injured] Foot injury Taken off with a metatarsal injury in the match against Sunderland on 22/2. Subsequently underwent surgery. His manager said on 9/4 that he was “not sure” he’d feature again this season. [Source]
[Injured] Foot injury A doubt for Burnley on 21/3 due to finger/foot knocks. Missed out. Still absent as of 17/4. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Ankle injury Substituted in the FA Cup tie against West Ham on 5/4 after rolling his ankle. Will “realistically” be out until May but his manager hopes he can recover sooner. Still not in training as of 21/4. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the whole of pre-season and the start of 2025/26 with a hamstring injury. Reports on 7/1 suggest another setback. Still out as of 13/3. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Arsenal on 8/1. His club described it as a "significant" injury on 11/1 and he will have to undergo surgery. Ruled out for the season. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Has been sidelined since September with a hamstring injury. Back in training in the week beginning 2/3 but suffered another hamstring issue on his comeback game for the under-21s on 16/3. Remains some distance from the first team as of 17/4. [Source]

[Injured] Achilles injury Stretchered off with a ruptured Achilles tendon in the match against PSG on 14/4. His club confirmed on 16/4 that it was a season-ending injury and that he would also miss the World Cup. [Source]
[Injured] Foot injury Stretchered off with a foot injury in the match against Sunderland on 11/2. His manager thinks it is a "serious one" and confirmed he would be out for "a while". [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Taken off with discomfort in the match against Paris Saint-Germain on 14/4. Will miss the Everton game on 19/4. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Stretchered off with a serious knee injury in the match against Southampton on 23/9. Has torn his ACL and will be out for a year. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Knee injury Taken off with a "big wound" in the match against Everton on 19/4. Reports suggest he'll be out for at least two weeks. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Missed the Brighton game on 21/3 with a muscle injury. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 3/4 that he will return "towards the end of the season". [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the EFL Cup final on 22/3 because of a hamstring injury. Had been near a return before suffering a knock in training over the international break. Still absent as of 21/4. [Source]

[Injured] Leg injury Taken off with a leg injury in the match against Chelsea on 4/1. His club confirmed that he'd "suffered a tibial fracture to his right leg" and would undergo surgery. His manager says he will be out for “a long time” but there is still hope he can feature before the end of the season. Still “not close” as of 10/4. [Source]

[Injured] Back injury Missed the West Ham game on 4/12 with a niggling back injury. Has been unavailable since as the recovery is taking much longer than anticipated. Still sidelined as of 17/4 with no return date set. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Forced off during the Arsenal match on 25/1 with what looked like a hamstring injury. His manager said he's not yet "training back on the pitch" on 17/4. [Source]
[Suspended] 3 Match Ban Suspended for three matches after being sent off for violent conduct on 13/4.
[Doubt 75%] Knock Limped when being taken off in the match against Chelsea on 18/4. No update was provided since. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Missed the Chelsea game on 18/4 with an issue that his manager hopes is "small". [Source]
[Suspended] 2 Match Ban Suspended for two matches after picking up his 10th booking of the season on 12/4. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Hip injury Missed the Bournemouth game on 18/4 with a minor hip flexor injury. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a knee injury on international duty with Sweden and missed the Manchester City match on 22/11 as a result. Has been absent since. Is “further back” in his recovery compared to other Newcastle defenders as of 2/1. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Thigh injury Was forced off in the Bournemouth game on 18/4. Was later seen applying ice to his thigh. [Source]

[Injured] Ankle injury Taken off with a significant ankle injury in the match against Leeds on 7/1. Subsequently underwent surgery and will be out for around three months. Hoped to return after the March international break but an infection has delayed that for a month. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury It was revealed on 10/2 that he hadn't been named in the 25-man Premier League squad because he was recovering from a knee injury. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Taken off with a quad injury in the match against Porto on 16/4. His club confirmed on 21/4 that he'd be out for the season. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Injured in the process of conceding Nottm Forest's third goal in their defeat to Aston Villa on 3/1. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 9/1 that he'd had some blood drained from his knee but the injury hasn't settled as quickly as hoped. Has since undergone surgery and is expected to miss the rest of the season. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Taken off in the match against Burnley on 19/4. His manager has ruled him out of the Sunderland game on 24/4. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Europa League match against Ferencvaros on 29/1 with a knee injury. Has been sidelined since and tests are ongoing as of 25/2 to determine how long he'll be out. [Source]
[Injured] Unknown Ruled out for 4-6 weeks with an unknown injury on 14/3. Confirmed on 23/4 that he will return to partial training next week. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Ankle injury Taken off in the match against Fulham on 22/2 due to an ankle injury. Has since undergone surgery. Confirmed on 23/4 that he has rejoined training. [Source]
[Injured] Hand injury Ruled out of the Tottenham Hotspur game on 12/4 with a hand injury. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Picked up a hamstring injury in the match against Fulham on 22/2. Ruled out for around eight weeks initially but has undergone surgery and his manager thinks his season may be over. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Leeds on 3/3. Confirmed on 23/4 that he will return to partial training next week. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Stretchered off with a serious-looking injury in the match against West Ham on 17/1. It was revealed on 19/1 that he has undergone surgery on a fractured ankle [Source]

[Injured] Thigh injury Suffered a serious quad injury in the match against Sunderland on 4/1. Had been aiming to return after the March international break but has suffered a setback and may need surgery. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knock in the match against Crystal Palace on 11/5. It later transpired that he had sustained a knee injury and would need season-ending surgery. Missed the start of 2025/26 and is still out as of 4/12. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off in the match against Newcastle on 10/2. The club later revealed he had suffered a ruptured ACL and will need surgery. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Sunderland on 12/4. Will miss the rest of the season. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Hernia His club confirmed on 20/3 that he will undergo surgery on a hernia. Not ready to return against Brighton on 18/4. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Muscle injury Missed the West Ham game on 10/4 with a “niggle”. Had trained ahead of the Leeds game on 18/4 but the club decided not to risk him. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Foot injury Substituted in the match against Leeds on 18/4 after he "felt pain under his foot and at the bottom of his toe". [Source]
[Injured] Shoulder injury Missed the match against Brentford on 16/3 with a shoulder injury and has been sidelined since. His manager said on 9/4 that he could be out for the season. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Neck Substituted in the match against Leeds on 18/4 with a whiplash injury to his neck. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Shoulder injury Missed the match against Leeds on 18/4 with a shoulder/back spasm. Had travelled with the team but didn't pass a fitness test. [Source]
[Suspended] 2 Match Ban Suspended for two matches after picking up his 10th booking of the season on 10/4. [Source]
